mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.sdate desc, hhmm desc, barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.sdate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.lotdate, a.location, a.print_ymdhms, a.qty, nvl((select sum(qty) from t_scm_barcode aa where a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode and useyn = 'Y'),0) as scanqty, (select nvl(sum(qty),0) from t_wms_workmove bb where bb.barcode in ( select aa.barcode from t_scm_barcode aa where a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode )) as workmoveqty , (select nvl(sum(qty),0) from t_wms_location bb where bb.barcode in ( select aa.barcode from t_scm_barcode aa where a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode )) as locationqty , a.print_qty, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.barcode FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY ITEMCODE ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT a.sdate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.lotdate, a.location, a.print_ymdhms, a.qty, nvl((select sum(qty) from t_scm_barcode aa where a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode and useyn = 'Y'),0) as scanqty, (a.qty - nvl((select sum(qty) from t_scm_barcode aa where a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode and useyn = 'Y'),0)) as remaining_qty, a.print_qty, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.barcode FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY sdate desc, hhmm desc, barcode
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sdate DESC, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, a.print_qty, NVL((SELECT SUM(aa.qty) FROM t_scm_barcode aa WHERE a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode AND aa.useyn = 'Y'), 0) AS scanqty, (SUM(a.qty) - nvl((select sum(qty) from t_scm_barcode aa where a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode and useyn = 'Y'),0)) as remaining_qty, (SELECT NVL(SUM(qty), 0) FROM t_wms_workmove bb WHERE bb.barcode IN ( SELECT aa.barcode FROM t_scm_barcode aa WHERE a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode)) AS workmoveqty, (SELECT NVL(SUM(qty), 0) FROM t_wms_location bb WHERE bb.barcode IN ( SELECT aa.barcode FROM t_scm_barcode aa WHERE a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode)) AS locationqty FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.barcode, a.print_qty ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY sdate DESC, itemcode

SELECT a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, a.print_qty, NVL((SELECT SUM(aa.qty) FROM t_scm_barcode aa WHERE a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode AND aa.useyn = 'Y'), 0) AS scanqty, (SUM(a.qty) - nvl((select sum(qty) from t_scm_barcode aa where a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode and useyn = 'Y'),0)) as remaining_qty, (SELECT NVL(SUM(qty), 0) FROM t_wms_workmove bb WHERE bb.barcode IN ( SELECT aa.barcode FROM t_scm_barcode aa WHERE a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode)) AS workmoveqty, (SELECT NVL(SUM(qty), 0) FROM t_wms_location bb WHERE bb.barcode IN ( SELECT aa.barcode FROM t_scm_barcode aa WHERE a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode)) AS locationqty FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.barcode, a.print_qty

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname )

SELECT sum(qty) FROM ( SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_factorymove a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'RECEIVING'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.sdate desc, t.itemcode desc) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.type, a.barcode, a.location, a.lotdate, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.lotdate as bdate FROM t_wms_realstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY sdate desc, itemcode

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.type, a.barcode, a.location, a.lotdate, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm FROM t_wms_realstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY sdate desc, a.itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_realstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_realstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_realstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.location, a.intf_yn )

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_realstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY indate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.iid, a.indate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.location, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as time FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'FEEDING'
) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT a.iid, a.indate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.location, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as time FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'FEEDING'
ORDER BY indate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'FEEDING'

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'FEEDING'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY indate desc, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch as car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'FEEDING'
GROUP BY a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY indate desc, itemcode

SELECT a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch as car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'FEEDING'
GROUP BY a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname ORDER BY indate desc, itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'FEEDING'
GROUP BY a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname )

SELECT sum(qty) FROM ( SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'FEEDING'
)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_WMS_OUTBOUND ( SDATE, BARCODE, YMDHMS, LOGINID,
ITEMCODE, BDATE, SEQ, QTY,
FACTORY, STORAGE, SOURCE, SOURCE2 ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid},
#{itemcode}, #{bdate}, #{seq}, #{qty},
#{factory}, #{storage}, #{source}, #{memo} )

INSERT INTO T_WMS_OUTBOUND ( OUTDATE, BARCODE, YMDHMS, LOGINID,
ITEMCODE, BDATE, SEQ, QTY,
SCMMEX, TYPE, FACTORY, STORAGE, SOURCE, SOURCE2, USEYN ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid},
#{itemcode}, #{bdate}, #{seq}, #{qty},
#{scmmex}, #{type}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{source}, #{memo}, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_WMS_LOCATIONBACKUP SET USEYN = 'N' , YMDHMS_D = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , MEMO_D = #{memo} WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode} AND BACKUP_DATE >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' 00:00:00' AND USEYN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, A.ITEMNAME, A.LOCATION, A.LASTSTATUS FROM V_STOCKINFO_N A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND B.DELDATE = ' ' WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode}

select useyn, sdate, kind, barcode, factory, storage, mktime as time, location, work, qty, laststatus, loginid , labeltype, partbarcode, custcode, custname, memo from v_itemhistory v where v.barcode = #{barcode}
SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = #{custCode}

SELECT COUNT(B.BARCODE) FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_WMS_LOCATION B ON A.BARCODE = B.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'N' AND ABS((TO_DATE(A.YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - TO_DATE(B.YMDHMS_D, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) * 86400) <= 5 WHERE A.BARCODE = #{barcode} AND A.USEYN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_WMS_LOCATION B ON A.YMDHMS = B.YMDHMS_D AND A.BARCODE = B.BARCODE WHERE A.BARCODE = #{barcode} AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.USEYN = 'N'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_WMS_LOCATION B ON A.BARCODE = B.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'N' AND ABS((TO_DATE(A.YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - TO_DATE(B.YMDHMS_D, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) * 86400) <= 5 WHERE A.BARCODE = #{barcode} AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.USEYN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_WMS_FACTORYMOVE WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode} AND SOURCE = 'RECEIVING' AND USEYN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_WMS_stockmove A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_WMS_LOCATION B ON A.BARCODE = B.BARCODE WHERE A.BARCODE = #{barcode} AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND b.source = 'STORAGEMOVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_WMS_CLOSE WHERE MONTH >= #{date}

SELECT KIND FROM V_ITEMHISTORY WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode} AND USEYN = 'Y' AND KIND <> #{kind} AND KIND NOT IN('STOCKCOUNT BARCODE', 'STOCKCOUNT LOCATION', 'LOCATION', 'LOCATION CHANGE') ORDER BY MKTIME DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
select bbarcode from t_scm_pallet WHERE pbarcode = #{barcode} AND useyn = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE T_WMS_LOCATION A SET USEYN = 'Y' , MEMO_D = '' , YMDHMS_D = '' WHERE A.IID=( SELECT MAX(B.IID) FROM T_WMS_LOCATION B WHERE B.BARCODE = #{barcode} AND B.USEYN = 'N' AND B.MEMO_D = #{memo_d} )

UPDATE T_WMS_WORKLOCATION A SET USEYN = 'Y' , MEMO_D = '' , YMDHMS_D = '' WHERE A.IID=( SELECT MAX(B.IID) FROM T_WMS_WORKLOCATION B WHERE B.BARCODE = #{barcode} AND B.USEYN = 'N' AND B.MEMO_D = #{memo_d} )

UPDATE t_wms_location SET useyn = 'N' , ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , MEMO_D = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION_D' , LOGINID_D = #{loginid} WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND BARCODE = #{barcode} AND upper(FACTORY) = upper(#{factory}) AND upper(STORAGE) = upper(#{storage})
UPDATE t_wms_inbound SET useyn = 'Y' WHERE iid = ( SELECT MAX(iid) FROM t_wms_inbound WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND USEYN = 'N' AND SOURCE = 'INCOMING' )
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_MM_ENTERSUB_IF( IFNO, MES_KEY, MES_SEQ,
DATA_DIV, CUD_DIV, DELETE_GUBUN ) VALUES( #{ifno}, #{meskey}, '1',
'SCM', 'D', 'A' )
mapper.select:
-------------사내총재고 조회 쿼리 WITH BASE AS ( SELECT factory, storage, itemcode, NVL(itemname, itemcode) AS itemname, -- ★ 핵심 SUM(qty) AS qty, MAX(in_if_x) AS in_if_x, MAX(out_if_x) AS out_if_x FROM V_STOCKSUM GROUP BY factory, storage, itemcode, NVL(itemname, itemcode) -- ★ 핵심 ), -- 공장/창고 그룹핑 규칙 PREP AS ( SELECT itemcode, itemname, storage AS fact_sto, (NVL(qty,0) - NVL(in_if_x,0) + NVL(out_if_x,0)) AS net_qty FROM BASE ), PIV AS ( SELECT itemcode, itemname, NVL("INBOUND",0) AS INBOUND, NVL("PRODUCT",0) AS PRODUCT, NVL("OUTSIDE",0) AS OUTSIDE FROM PREP PIVOT ( SUM(net_qty) FOR fact_sto IN ( 'INBOUND' AS "INBOUND", 'PRODUCT' AS "PRODUCT", 'OUTSIDE' AS "OUTSIDE" ) ) ) SELECT itemcode, itemname, INBOUND, PRODUCT, OUTSIDE FROM ( SELECT 'TOTAL' AS itemcode, 'TOTAL' AS itemname, SUM(INBOUND) AS INBOUND, SUM(PRODUCT) AS PRODUCT, SUM(OUTSIDE) AS OUTSIDE FROM PIV
UNION ALL
SELECT itemcode, itemname, INBOUND, PRODUCT, OUTSIDE FROM PIV ) WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY CASE WHEN itemcode = 'TOTAL' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, itemcode

WITH BASE_INV AS ( /* 1️⃣ 월 1일 INVENTORY (기준재고) */ SELECT ITEMCODE, SUM(PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY) AS BASE_QTY FROM V_STOCK WHERE KIND = 'INVENTORY'
AND SDATE = #{sdate} -- 조회시작월의 1일 GROUP BY ITEMCODE ), BEFORE_MOV AS ( /* 2️⃣ 조회 시작일 이전 수불 */ SELECT ITEMCODE, SUM(PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY) AS BEFORE_QTY FROM V_STOCK WHERE KIND <> 'INVENTORY' AND SDATE >= #{sdate} --조회시작월의 1일 AND SDATE < #{searchParams.fromDate} --조회시작일
GROUP BY ITEMCODE ), PERIOD_MOV AS ( /* 3️⃣ 조회기간 수불 (FROM ~ TO) */ SELECT A.ITEMCODE,
SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'INCOMING' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS INCOMING_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'INCOMING RETURN' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS INCOMING_RETURN_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'INCOMING EXCEPTION' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS INCOMING_EXCEPTION_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'LOAD' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS LOAD_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'LOAD RETURN' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS LOAD_RETURN_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'LOAD EXCEPTION' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS LOAD_EXCEPTION_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'STOCKMOVE' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS STOCKMOVE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'ADJUSTMENT' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS ADJUSTMENT_QTY, -NVL(MAX(B.QTY), 0) AS ADJUSTMENT2_QTY,
SUM(PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY) AS PERIOD_TOTAL_QTY FROM V_STOCK A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROOMCODE, ITEMCODE, SUM(QTY) AS QTY FROM T_ST_CHANGESUB WHERE CONDATE BETWEEN REPLACE(#{searchParams.fromDate}, '-', '') AND REPLACE(#{searchParams.toDate}, '-', '')
GROUP BY ROOMCODE, ITEMCODE ) B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE WHERE KIND <> 'INVENTORY'
AND SDATE BETWEEN #{searchParams.fromDate} AND #{searchParams.toDate} --조회기간 GROUP BY A.ITEMCODE ), BASE AS ( SELECT COALESCE(b.ITEMCODE, bf.ITEMCODE, p.ITEMCODE) AS ITEMCODE, NVL(b.BASE_QTY, 0) AS BASE_QTY, NVL(b.BASE_QTY, 0) + NVL(bf.BEFORE_QTY, 0) AS INVENTORY_QTY, NVL(p.INCOMING_QTY, 0) AS INCOMING_QTY, NVL(p.INCOMING_RETURN_QTY, 0) AS INCOMING_RETURN_QTY, NVL(p.INCOMING_EXCEPTION_QTY, 0) AS INCOMING_EXCEPTION_QTY, NVL(p.LOAD_QTY, 0) AS LOAD_QTY, NVL(p.LOAD_RETURN_QTY, 0) AS LOAD_RETURN_QTY, NVL(p.LOAD_EXCEPTION_QTY, 0) AS LOAD_EXCEPTION_QTY, NVL(p.STOCKMOVE_QTY, 0) AS STOCKMOVE_QTY, NVL(p.ADJUSTMENT_QTY, 0) AS ADJUSTMENT_QTY, NVL(p.ADJUSTMENT2_QTY, 0) AS ADJUSTMENT2_QTY, NVL(b.BASE_QTY, 0) + NVL(bf.BEFORE_QTY, 0) + NVL(p.PERIOD_TOTAL_QTY, 0) + NVL(p.ADJUSTMENT2_QTY, 0) AS TOTAL_QTY FROM BASE_INV b FULL OUTER JOIN BEFORE_MOV bf ON bf.ITEMCODE = b.ITEMCODE FULL OUTER JOIN PERIOD_MOV p ON p.ITEMCODE = COALESCE(b.ITEMCODE, bf.ITEMCODE) ) SELECT t.SUBNAME_CH AS ITEMTYPE, x.ITEMCODE, i.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, i.ITEMNAME, x.BASE_QTY, x.INVENTORY_QTY, x.INCOMING_QTY, x.INCOMING_RETURN_QTY, x.INCOMING_EXCEPTION_QTY, x.LOAD_QTY, x.LOAD_RETURN_QTY, x.LOAD_EXCEPTION_QTY, x.STOCKMOVE_QTY, x.ADJUSTMENT_QTY, x.ADJUSTMENT2_QTY, x.TOTAL_QTY, SUM(x.TOTAL_QTY) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM BASE x LEFT JOIN t_mi_item i ON i.ITEMCODE = x.ITEMCODE AND i.DELDATE = ' ' LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub t ON t.subcode = i.cmb_itemtype and t.typecode = 'MI002' WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY x.ITEMCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.QTY) OVER() AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.BARCODE, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, NVL(A.OLDLOCATION, ' ') AS OLDLOCATION, A.SOURCE, A.RACK FROM T_WMS_LOCATION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND (A.RACK IS NULL OR A.RACK = '-')
GROUP BY A.BARCODE, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.SOURCE, A.OLDLOCATION, A.RACK ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC, X.ITEMCODE

SELECT A.IID, A.mes_key, A.INTF_YN, A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.WCCODE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.ROOMCODE, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.MEMO_D,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER () TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'WIPRETURN'
ORDER BY A.INDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT x.*, SUM(x.QTY) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, NVL(A.WCCODE, ' ') AS WCCODE FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'WIPRETURN'
GROUP BY A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.WCCODE ) x ORDER BY x.INDATE DESC

SELECT a.iid, a.intf_yn, a.sdate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.type, nvl(a.custcode,(SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1)) AS custcode, nvl(a.custname,(SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE CU_CODE = (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1))) as custname, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.source3, a.dock, a.invoiceno, a.container, b.spec, a.mes_key as meskey, SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOAD'
ORDER BY SDATE DESC, YMDHMS DESC, BARCODE

SELECT x.*, SUM(x.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, a.intf_yn,
NVL( a.custcode, (SELECT custcode FROM (SELECT custcode FROM t_sm_salecustprice WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) ) AS custcode, NVL( a.custname, (SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE cu_code = ( SELECT custcode FROM (SELECT custcode FROM t_sm_salecustprice WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 )) ) AS custname, a.source3, a.dock, a.container, a.invoiceno, b.spec FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOAD'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.factory, a.intf_yn, a.custcode, a.custname, a.dock, a.source3, a.container, a.invoiceno, b.spec ) x ORDER BY x.sdate DESC, itemcode

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, NVL(A.CUSTNAME, ( SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) )) AS CUSTNAME, B.SPEC, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.TYPE, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADRETURN'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, NVL(A.CUSTNAME, ( SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) )) AS CUSTNAME, B.SPEC, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, A.TYPE FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADRETURN'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.INTF_YN, B.SPEC, A.CUSTNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.TYPE ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE1, A.STORAGE2, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, A.BARCODE, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.MES_KEY, CASE WHEN INSTR(A.BARCODE, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(A.BARCODE, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND B.DELDATE = ' ' LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'RECEIVING'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE1, A.STORAGE2, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND B.DELDATE = ' ' LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'RECEIVING'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE1, A.STORAGE2, A.INTF_YN, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE1, A.STORAGE2, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, A.BARCODE, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.MES_KEY, CASE WHEN INSTR(A.BARCODE, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(A.BARCODE, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'SENDING'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE1, A.STORAGE2, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.BARCODE, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.SOURCE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'RECEIVING'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sentdate, A.FACTORY AS sentfactory, A.STORAGE1 AS sentstorage, A.STORAGE2 AS tostorage, A.BARCODE AS barcode, A.ITEMCODE AS itemcode, B.SPEC AS oitemcode, A.LOGINID AS loginid, A.YMDHMS AS ymdhms, B.ITEMNAME AS itemname, C.SUBNAME_CH AS car, TO_NUMBER(A.QTY) AS qty, NVL(I.scanqty, 0) AS scanqty, TO_NUMBER(A.QTY) - NVL(I.scanqty, 0) AS remainqty FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE A LEFT JOIN ( /* ✅ RECEIVING 으로 스캔된 수량 합산 (BARCODE 기준) */ SELECT W.BARCODE AS BARCODE, SUM(TO_NUMBER(W.QTY)) AS scanqty FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE W WHERE W.SOURCE = 'RECEIVING' AND W.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY W.BARCODE ) I ON I.BARCODE = A.BARCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND DELDATE = ' ' LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.SOURCE = 'SENDING' AND A.USEYN = 'Y'
AND NVL(I.scanqty, 0) < TO_NUMBER(A.QTY) ORDER BY A.YMDHMS

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_stockmove a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'RECEIVING'

SELECT A.IID, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.BARCODE, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, A.YMDHMS_F, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, CASE WHEN INSTR(A.BARCODE, ',' ) > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(A.BARCODE, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_FACTORYMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'SENDING'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.BARCODE, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, A.YMDHMS_F, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.SOURCE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_FACTORYMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'RECEIVING'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.CUSTCODE, NVL(A.CUSTNAME, ( SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ))AS CUSTNAME, A.TYPE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.BDATE, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.INVOICENO, A.MES_KEY,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGRETURN'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.CUSTCODE, NVL(A.CUSTNAME, ( SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ))AS CUSTNAME, A.TYPE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGRETURN'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.CUSTCODE, A.CUSTNAME, A.TYPE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, A.INVOICENO, NVL(A.SOURCE2, 'EXCEPTION') AS SOURCE2,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, A.INVOICENO, A.TYPE, CASE WHEN A.INVOICENO = 'BARCODECOUNT' THEN 'STOCKCOUNT' ELSE A.SOURCE2 END AS SOURCE2,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, A.INVOICENO, NVL(A.SOURCE2, 'EXCEPTION') AS SOURCE2,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
AND UPPER(a.source2) = 'STOCKCOUNT' ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, A.INVOICENO, A.TYPE, CASE WHEN A.INVOICENO = 'BARCODECOUNT' THEN 'STOCKCOUNT' ELSE 'EXCEPTION' END AS SOURCE2,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
AND UPPER(a.source2) = 'STOCKCOUNT' ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE
SELECT A.ITEMCODE, A.ITEMNAME, A.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, B.SUBNAME_CH as car FROM T_MI_ITEM A LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB B ON B.SUBCODE = A.CARNO WHERE SPEC = #{oitemcode} and deldate = ' '
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_WMS_STOCKMOVE ( SDATE, ITEMCODE, BARCODE, QTY, FACTORY, STORAGE1, STORAGE2, YMDHMS, LOGINID, SOURCE ) VALUES ( #{sdate}, #{itemcode}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage1}, #{storage2}, #{ymdhms}, #{loginid}, #{source2} )

INSERT INTO T_WMS_STOCK( SDATE, KIND, BARCODE, INQTY, OUTQTY, QTY, FACTORY, STORAGE, FACTORY2, STORAGE2, ITEMCODE, LOGINID, INSDATE, YMDHMS, MAINKIND ) VALUES ( #{sdate}, #{source}, #{barcode}, #{inqty}, #{outqty}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage1}, #{factory}, #{storage2}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, #{sdate}, #{ymdhms}, 'MOVE' )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.IID, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.OLDOKYN, A.NEWOKYN, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE FROM T_WMS_CONDITIONCHANGE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND B.DELDATE = ' ' LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND USEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY IID DESC
